name: Cinnamon-Raisin Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Mix eggwhites, vanilla extract, and sugar until foamy.
3. Gradually add flour mixture, stirring constantly.
4. Fold in raisins and cinnamon; mix well.
5. Form dough into logs about 2-inch wide and 10 inches long on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes at 325°F, or until firm to the touch but not browned.
7. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
8. Turn down oven temperature to 250°F.
9. Slice logs into 20-24 pieces; place upright on baking sheets.
10. Return to oven for another 30-40 minutes, slicing thicker pieces take longer but should not brown further.
11. Allow biscotti to cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
